name: Tasty Pineapple Cake
recipeIngredient: Sugar substitute to equal -- 2 1/2 cups sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar substitute until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well with an electric mixer.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the creamed mixture, starting and ending with the flour mixture. Beat at low speed after each addition.
5. Fold in the pineapple chunks into the batter.
6. Pour the batter into a 6-cup Bundt pan or heavy ring mold coated with cooking spray.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Combine the remaining pineapple juice and sugar substitute in a bowl, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
9. Remove the cake from the oven and pour the juice over the cake while it is still hot. Allow it to cool completely on a wire rack.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 129; CHO: 46mg; CAR: 17gm; PRO: 3gm; FAT: 5gm; SOD: 341;
